reviews.comment:
Con el combustible no tengo quejas... Pero cada vez que querés hacer una promo con infinia da la casualidad que no hay sistema... Poco personal trabajando... Siempre hay cola. Nunca ofrecen ni siquiera un café. Ni repasar vidrios.

(Translated by Google)
I have no complaints about the fuel... But every time you want to take advantage of an Infinia promotion, the system is down... There are hardly any staff members working... There's always a line. They never even offer a coffee. Or a window cleaning.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBemJUS2FREAE

reviews.comment:
Deberían mejorar la atención en playa sobre todo el lenguaje y trato con el cliente, deberían darle un curso de atención al público, no así a los que atienden el ampm que les sobra calidad de atención...

(Translated by Google)
They should improve the service on the beach, especially the language and treatment of customers. They should give them a customer service course, unlike those who work at the AMPM (Amazon Pass), who already provide excellent service...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBcTZYbkVnEAE
